title: HOZELOCK - Sprinkler Rotating 177 m² : Spike-mounted Spray Sprinkler for Medium-sized Surfaces (ø 15m), Ideal for Lawns and Established Plants, 8 Jets: 2 Spray Patterns [2510P0000]
features: Reaches a maximum area coverage of 177m² and a maximum diameter of 15 metres.
Twin arm spikes with 8 jets provide even coverage.
Ideal for use with turf and established plants.
Simply spike into the ground and connect to a tap.
description: From the manufacturer Hozelock Round Sprinkler 177m² High performance spike garden sprinkler – water covers circular areas up to 15m in diameter. Round Sprinkler 177m² The Hozelock Round Sprinkler 177m² is a high performance, twin arm spike sprinkler. It uses 8 jets to efficiently water your garden with an even coating. To use, simply mount the tough spike into the ground, and using the built in quick connect attachment, attach a hose with a female hose end connector on the end. Even coverage – It uses 8 jets to efficiently water your garden with an even coverage. Ideal for use on turf & established plants – This Round Sprinkler will reach a maximum area coverage of 177m² and a maximum diameter of 15m. Key benefits include: Reach a maximum area coverage of 177m² Twin arm spikes with 8 jets provide even coverage Mounted on tough spike for use in lawns and borders that provides great stability Round Sprinkler 177m² Round Sprinkler Plus 254m² Multi Sprinkler 79m² Round Sprinkler Plus 314m² Round Sprinkler Pro 314m² Round Sprinkler Pro 314m² Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 948 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,072 4.3 out of 5 stars 4,407 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,072 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,757 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,757 Price £6.53 £ 6 . 53 £18.99 £ 18 . 99 £9.00 £ 9 . 00 £22.50 £ 22 . 50 £21.27 £ 21 . 27 £27.95 £ 27 . 95 Maximum Coverage 177m² 254m² 79m² 314m² 314m² 314m² Number Of Jets 8 2 8 5 5 5 Sprinkler Spray pattern Jet Fine Spray, Jet Mist, Strip, Jet Jet Jet, Fine Spray Jet, Fine Spray Sprinkler Base Spike Sled Sled Spike Spike Sled Sprinkler Shape Circle Circle Semi Circle, Full Circle, Square Circle & Semi Circle Circle & Semi Circle Circle & Semi Circle
